auditor: Watson & Company Chartered Professional Accountants LLP
economic_notes: Nation operates N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., and N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation as consolidated subsidiaries. BC Hydro St'at'imc settlement trust provides annual distributions. COVID-19 impacts noted.
notes: Audit is qualified on two grounds: (1) incomplete tangible capital asset listing possibly containing impaired or disposed assets; (2) insufficient allowance for bad debts on band member receivables of $385,009 ($347,829 significantly overdue, only $76,785 allowance recorded). Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,749,813 + FNHA $244,962 + Government of Canada $25,955 + Province of BC $430,153 + CMHC $47,241 + FNESC $45,160 + New Relationship Trust $6,400 = $2,549,684 (Tribal Councils/Associations $140,782 included gives $2,543,324 if excluded as non-government; included here as $2,543,324 excluding Tribal Councils). St'at'imc Trust and BC Hydro treated as non-government OSR. Three subsidiaries fully consolidated: N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation.
